reply_original:
Hi there! I understand your frustration regarding limits and content restrictions.

To maintain high-quality AI, we face significant server costs, making unlimited free chat difficult. Regarding censorship, we must follow Google Play policies to keep the app available.

Please share more details at support@fantachat.ai so we can help!
reply_zh:
你好！我理解你对额度限制和内容限制的沮丧。

为了维持高质量的 AI 服务，我们面临着巨大的服务器成本，因此很难提供无限次的免费聊天。关于审查制度，我们必须遵守 Google Play 的政策，以确保应用能够正常上架。

请发送更多详情至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们提供帮助！
